.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformatted string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "..." + WRAPPER_VERSION + "...";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant assignments to single lines for consistency.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords in conditional statements to adhere to coding style.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Import CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers, likely to prevent log injection or formatting issues.
Refactor multi-line string concatenation in log.info call to use Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Inject CRLF_SAFE_MARKER into log statements to ensure log lines are handled correctly by the logging framework.
Update active profiles logic to fall back to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring consistent behavior.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix formatting or encoding issues.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed '\'' to ''' in the error message string literal.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update Hazelcast configuration API usage from manual map config registration to the newer addMapConfig method.
Refactor MapConfig initialization to use the constructor with the map name instead of relying on implicit default naming or external registration.
Update annotation attribute syntax from implicit single-value to explicit array initializer.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import, likely because the dependency was removed or the module is no longer needed in this configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; and the problemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import, likely because the dependency was removed or the module is no longer needed in this configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; and the constraintViolationProblemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove explicit header configurations (CSP, Referrer-Policy, Feature-Policy) that are no longer configured via HttpSecurity in this migration step.
Add explicit @Configuration annotation to the class, which was previously implied by extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.
Add support for allowed origin patterns in CORS configuration to handle wildcard origins which are restricted in newer servlet specs.
Update CORS registration paths to align with Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints, removing legacy Swagger 2 paths.
